title: Markets Trade in Uncharted Territory
html:
Markets Trade in Uncharted Territory

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: Only the DOW remains below all-time highs, while other major indices trade in uncharted territory. From current levels, resistance appears limited (Fibonacci levels), making the path forward heavily dependent on sentiment and earnings reactions. This morning's strong TSM quarterly results saw a muted market response, suggesting much of the positive news may already be reflected in prices.

+ SPX tracker: The momentum rally continues into record territory, with no real nearby support.
Levels: Resistance at 7041, 7223, and 7354. Support at 6900, 6845, 6794, and 6746.
- Short term lines: ES_F | SPX

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 131313)

Nic

+ Key Talking Point:
— TOMORROW —
★★ Industrial Production
★★ Initial Jobless Claims
— Tue Apr 21 —
★★★ Advance Retail Sales

+ Earnings TABLE
Thu Apr 16: TSM PEP ABT SCHW PLD BK USB MRSH TRV CFG WIT KEY | NFLX AA
Fri Apr 17: TFC FITB ERIC STT RF ALLY | (HDB IBN)

NOTE ID: 202604160442 | 0416
